metadata.description: Raven — discipline for AI engineering: strategic quality-engineered thinking (Andie's plan-first, multi-angle, human-gated reasoning) plus structure (deterministic specialist routing) and security (local commit guards, edit gating, audit logs). MIT, runs entirely on your machine.

plugins.name: raven
plugins.description: Discipline for AI engineering. Andie brings strategic quality-engineered thinking: plan first, challenge from functional/technical/data/critic angles, advance only through human approval gates; Andie-Jr runs structured 2-round root-cause triage on brownfield bugs. Structure: deterministic routers pick the right one of 61 specialists, never silently. Security: local hooks hard-block secrets and high-CVSS libraries at commit, gate edits until a specialist ran, and audit-log everything. Zero telemetry, all local.
